auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Knack server-side REST API key used with the X-Knack-REST-API-Key header. View it under Settings -> API & Code -> API in the Knack Builder: https://docs.knack.com/v3/reference/api-key-app-id.

extraFields.label: Application ID
extraFields.description: The Knack Application ID sent with the X-Knack-Application-Id header. Copy it from Settings -> API & Code -> API in the Knack Builder: https://docs.knack.com/v3/reference/api-key-app-id.

actions.name: create_record
actions.description: Create one Knack record in the selected object with a raw JSON record payload.

objectKey.description: The Knack object key, such as object_1, that identifies which object to query.

format.description: The Knack response format query parameter forwarded to the API.

record.description: A Knack record payload containing field_xx keys and any nested data returned by the API.

inputSchema.description: Request parameters for creating one Knack record in the selected object.

record.description: A Knack record payload containing field_xx keys and any nested data returned by the API.

actions.name: delete_record
actions.description: Delete one Knack record by object key and record ID.

objectKey.description: The Knack object key, such as object_1, that identifies which object to query.

recordId.description: The Knack record ID, such as 6838de4ef4d2453c4d1b402f, that identifies one record.

inputSchema.description: Request parameters for deleting one Knack record by object key and record ID.

deleted.description: Whether the Knack delete request completed successfully.

recordId.description: The Knack record ID, such as 6838de4ef4d2453c4d1b402f, that identifies one record.

anyOf.description: The raw Knack delete response payload when the API returned a JSON body.

outputSchema.description: The normalized Knack record deletion response.

actions.name: get_record
actions.description: Retrieve one Knack record by object key and record ID.

objectKey.description: The Knack object key, such as object_1, that identifies which object to query.

recordId.description: The Knack record ID, such as 6838de4ef4d2453c4d1b402f, that identifies one record.

format.description: The Knack response format query parameter forwarded to the API.

inputSchema.description: Request parameters for reading one Knack record by object key and record ID.

record.description: A Knack record payload containing field_xx keys and any nested data returned by the API.

actions.name: list_records
actions.description: List records from one Knack object with optional pagination, sorting, formatting, and filter query parameters.

objectKey.description: The Knack object key, such as object_1, that identifies which object to query.

page.description: The 1-based page number to request from Knack.

rowsPerPage.description: The number of records to request per page, from 1 to 1000.

format.description: The Knack response format query parameter forwarded to the API.

sortField.description: The Knack field key used for server-side sorting, such as field_25.

sortOrder.description: The Knack sort order applied to the selected sort field.

filters.description: The Knack filters JSON object forwarded to the filters query parameter as-is.

inputSchema.description: Request parameters for listing records from one Knack object.

items.description: A Knack record payload containing field_xx keys and any nested data returned by the API.

records.description: The records returned by the current Knack list request.

anyOf.description: The current Knack response page when the API includes pagination metadata.
The total number of available Knack pages when returned by the API.
The total number of Knack records that match the current query.

raw.description: The raw Knack list response envelope returned by the API.

outputSchema.description: The normalized Knack record list returned by the connector.

actions.name: update_record
actions.description: Update one Knack record by sending a partial JSON payload for the selected object and record ID.

objectKey.description: The Knack object key, such as object_1, that identifies which object to query.

recordId.description: The Knack record ID, such as 6838de4ef4d2453c4d1b402f, that identifies one record.

format.description: The Knack response format query parameter forwarded to the API.

record.description: A Knack record payload containing field_xx keys and any nested data returned by the API.

inputSchema.description: Request parameters for updating one Knack record in the selected object.

record.description: A Knack record payload containing field_xx keys and any nested data returned by the API.
